title: Agent CRUD endpoints with quota enforcement
acceptance_criteria: POST /api/v1/auth/agents: creates agent, returns token shown ONCE
GET /api/v1/auth/agents: lists all agents with status, last_seen_at, requests_today
DELETE /api/v1/auth/agents/{name}: revokes agent, invalidates all tokens
Quota enforcement: Hobby=5 agents, Pro=50, Scale=unlimited. 403 with code 'tier_limit_reached' when exceeded
agents_count incremented on create, decremented on delete (atomic)
